creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
I cannot start Keybase on FreeBSD anymore:

```
$ keybase service
▶ INFO Service#Run() exiting with error resource temporarily unavailable (code 0) [tags:SVC=Rn42-gi7ALVe]
▶ ERROR resource temporarily unavailable
```

Versions:
- FreeBSD 15.0-CURRENT amd64
- keybase: 6.4.0
